Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Continued To Sep-28-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Epic Machines Inc.'s Motion for Preliminary Injunction is continued to Wednesday, September 28, 2016 at 2:00 p.m., in Department 302 to be heard by Judge Joseph M. Quinn. Defendants have submitted 92 objections to Plaintiff's evidence. Defendants and Plaintiff are ordered to meet and confer in an attempt to resolve as many objections as possible by agreement. By noon on Friday, September 23, 2016, Plaintiff shall file any evidence revised pursuant to the meet and confer (without adding any material evidence) and Defendant shall file revised objections (without adding new objections) in a format consistent with California Rules of Court, rule 3.1354 including a column for rulings on the objections. Blunderbuss objections are disfavored. (See Cole v. Town of Los Gatos (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 749, 764.) Courtesy copies of the latter documents must be provided to Department 302 by the time of filing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
